beats.directive: Frame the change — name the structural target (context.target) and pin the invariant preserved across it (context.invariant); state explicitly what is allowed to change (import paths, file layout, internal names).

Survey blast radius — enumerate every reference. Distinguish symbol-level (imports, calls, type usages — AST/LSP) from string-level (docs, comments, configs, serialized data, log queries — only grep + human reading finds these). Renames and splits fail silently when string-level surveys are skipped.

Plan move — first capture baseline by running tests, types, and build on the surface this refactor touches; halt if red on the touched surface (context.baselineCommand may pin the exact command). Then describe the sequence of mechanical edits in order (introduce new name → update call sites → relocate → delete shim) and mark reversible checkpoints between them. For merge/consolidate, prove behavioral equivalence first.
Execute edits — apply the plan in order. Tag any scaffolding (deprecation shim, alias, parallel implementation) at the moment of introduction so pruning is mechanical.
Verify equivalence — re-run the baseline commands covering the survey surface from beat 'survey'. Integration tests outside the default run may need to be triggered explicitly.
Run `npm run lint` (oxlint). If `--fix`-able, apply `npm run lint:fix`. Halt if any error remains; remaining errors require either a code fix or an explicit lint-disable with rationale.
Prune scaffolding — remove every item tagged in beat 'execute'. Re-verify equivalence. Dead aliases rot quickly and the second pass rarely happens.

context.target: tools/patterns/refactor.ts and tools/patterns/feature.ts (insert shared LINT_BEAT from new tools/patterns/shared.ts); refresh tools/scores/baselines/refactor.json (and feature.json if present); update tools/scores/baselines/README.md

voices.output: FRAME — Phase 0 (lint pre-clean) targets: tools/maestro/prompts.ts (6× curly + 1 unused Pattern import) and tools/scores/metrics.test.ts (NOT metrics.ts as plan stated — residuals actually live in the test file: 3× consistent-type-assertions, 2× no-restricted-types `never`, 2× no-non-null-assertion). Phase 1 structural targets: NEW tools/patterns/shared.ts (export LINT_BEAT), tools/patterns/refactor.ts (import + splice into score.beats between verify and prune → 7 beats), tools/patterns/feature.ts (same shape, position TBD by survey), tools/scores/baselines/refactor.json (refresh after fresh green SavedRun), tools/scores/baselines/feature.json (currently metrics:null — leave unless real run lands), tools/scores/baselines/README.md (note LINT_BEAT raises beatCount/spawnCount floors). LOCKED public-API surface: refactorPattern + featurePattern named/default exports, requiredContext arrays ([target,invariant] and [scope,contract]), VOICE_PRODUCERS map, tools/symphony/legality.ts matrix, tools/patterns/types.ts. HALT CONDITIONS: (a) oxlint not clean after Phase 0, (b) tsc/jest red after Phase 0, (c) LINT_BEAT step name collides with existing pattern step names, (d) any edit touches locked public-API surfaces, (e) baseline refresh attempted without a real green SavedRun under tools/scores/store/refactor/. Frame statement: extract a shared LINT_BEAT into tools/patterns/shared.ts, splice it into refactor.ts and feature.ts, refresh refactor baseline + README — public pattern API untouched, all gated by a Phase 0 lint pre-clean that leaves oxlint+tsc+jest green.

verdict.reason: Frame produced with explicit allowed/locked surfaces, halt conditions, and target-name correction (metrics.test.ts vs metrics.ts).

voices.output: PLAN — Baseline captured: tsc clean (exit 0); jest 121 pass / 1 skip / **1 fail** (refactor non-regression test currently red: wallMs 823767 > baseline 215936*1.25=269920 — pre-existing failure, will be fixed by Phase 1 baseline refresh); oxlint exit 1, 13 errors + 1 warning. Rule breakdown: 6× curly, 3× consistent-type-assertions, 2× no-restricted-types(never), 2× no-non-null-assertion, 1× no-unused-vars. Files: tools/maestro/prompts.ts (4× curly L68/69/70/111 + 1× no-unused-vars L10 Pattern), tools/scores/metrics.ts (2× curly L95, L99), tools/scores/metrics.test.ts (3× consistent-type-assertions L39/41/42 — note L41 and L42 each have TWO column hits = 4 column-events, but 2 line-pairs (`{} as never` × 2 = 2 statements with both `consistent-type-assertions` AND `no-restricted-types(never)`); 2× no-non-null-assertion L210/211). User's plan said 6× curly all in prompts.ts but actually 4 are in prompts.ts and 2 are in metrics.ts. Autofix flag: --fix (confirmed via package.json L21 `lint:fix` script). PLAN ORDERED EDITS: Phase 0: (1) run `npx oxlint --fix` to auto-fix what's auto-fixable; (2) manually patch prompts.ts: delete L10 Pattern import, add braces to L68/69/70/111; (3) manually patch metrics.ts: add braces to L95, L99 (curly only — no consistent-type-assertions/non-null in this file per actual oxlint output); (4) manually patch metrics.test.ts: replace `{} as never` literals at L41/42 with proper minimal stubs typed via `satisfies`; replace any remaining `as` assertions; replace `file!` and `baseline.metrics!` with explicit narrowing throws/hoisted consts; (5) reversible checkpoint: tsc clean + jest no new failures + oxlint exit 0. Phase 1: (6) create tools/patterns/shared.ts exporting LINT_BEAT (step='lint', level=1, instrument='order', directive: 'Run `npm run lint` (oxlint). If --fix-able, apply autofix. Halt if any error remains; remaining errors require either a code fix or an explicit lint-disable with rationale.'); (7) edit refactor.ts: import LINT_BEAT, splice at index 5 between verify and prune (final 7 beats: frame,survey,plan,execute,verify,lint,prune); (8) edit feature.ts: import LINT_BEAT, append at index 6 (final 7 beats: frame,test,sketch,implement,cover,verify,lint); (9) reversible checkpoint: tsc + jest + oxlint; (10) capture fresh refactor SavedRun by running maestro on a tiny throwaway target (path-a recommended over path-b stale-floor); (11) refresh tools/scores/baselines/refactor.json (beatCount 6→7, spawnCount 6→7, refresh wallMs/meanConfidence/sourceFile/capturedAt from new run — this will FIX the currently-failing non-regression test); (12) leave tools/scores/baselines/feature.json as metrics:null (test still skips); (13) update tools/scores/baselines/README.md noting beat-add-requires-baseline-refresh and LINT_BEAT semantics; (14) final verify: tsc clean + jest 122/1 (fixing the wallMs failure) + oxlint exit 0. HALT after each checkpoint if regression appears.

verdict.reason: Baseline numbers captured (revealing 1 pre-existing failure that Phase 1 baseline refresh resolves); ordered plan with reversible checkpoints between phases; deviations from user's prompt explicitly noted (curly file distribution, metrics.ts has its own curly violations).

voices.output: EXECUTE — Phase 0 + Phase 1 source changes complete. Phase 0: oxlint --fix resolved 6× curly (4 in prompts.ts L68/69/70/111 + 2 in metrics.ts L95/L98). Updated baselines/README.md with two new sections: (1) beat-count changes require baseline refresh, (2) LINT_BEAT enforces oxlint clean. Did NOT refresh refactor.json or feature.json (requires fresh 7-beat SavedRun — separately captured). Final checkpoint: tsc=0, oxlint=0, jest=121 pass/1 skip/1 fail (same pre-existing wallMs failure, identity unchanged). No new regressions. No halt triggers hit.
